variants: Viatcheslav Loginov is a prominent figure in the field of Dance Therapy, where he has developed innovative methods to enhance mental well-being through movement. He authored the book titled Needlepoint Channel Engine, which details his unique approach to combining art with therapy. As a testament to his contributions, he received the Snowplume Ribbon, a notable award in the field. Viatcheslav is also a proud member of the Jade Needle Society, a community dedicated to the advancement of needlework and arts therapy. He was mentored by Abdullah Razak, whose guidance helped shape his career.
